title: Radiology Technician
description: UCSF Health is seeking a Radiology Technician to support imaging services and patient care. You'll operate imaging equipment, prepare patients, and maintain high technical and safety standards. Work hybrid in San Jose for a leading academic health system advancing patient care and research.
responsibilities: Operate diagnostic imaging equipment (X-ray, CT, MRI, ultrasound)
Prepare and position patients for imaging procedures
Maintain equipment and perform routine quality assurance checks
Ensure patient safety and comfort throughout procedures
Maintain accurate imaging records and documentation

requirements.education: Associate's degree in Radiologic Technology from AERS-accredited program

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
